# zylos-rounds-client

Portable management client for [zylos-rounds](https://github.com/zylos-ai/zylos-rounds).

**Auto-mirrored from `zylos-ai/zylos-rounds` (`client/` + `scripts/cli.js`) on every release — do not edit or open PRs here.** Source of truth: https://github.com/zylos-ai/zylos-rounds

Install as a zylos component: `zylos add rounds-client` — or see SKILL.md for manual install on any agent runtime.
